description: Style Noteadrika captures the mood of the moment with this statement piece designed to snazz up any outfit. Keep the rest of your accessories minimal for maximum impact and style this with a monochrome top. Product DetailsLong chain with orange and brown coloured large beads Strung on a black cordCan be worn as a single long strand or a shorter double strandMaterial and CareGlass beads and a cotton cordWipe with soft cloth to maintain shine and keep away dust and dirtSizeLength: 65 cm
